nodes.name: Receive document
NeuroAlign Transform
nodes.notes:
Calls the NeuroAlign FastAPI endpoint.
Response contains: final_markdown, mermaid_diagram, chart_data, readability metrics, cost_usd.

nodes.name: Transform succeeded?
nodes.notes: Routes to delivery on success, error handler on failure.

nodes.name: Format output
nodes.notes:
Formats the NeuroAlign response into email-ready HTML and a structured summary object.
Access fields downstream with: {{ $json.markdown }}, {{ $json.summary.readability_gain }}

nodes.name: Format error
nodes.notes: Handles pipeline errors. Connect to a notification node (Slack, email) to alert on failures.

nodes.name: Return response
nodes.notes:
Returns the formatted result to the original webhook caller.
For async workflows (email delivery), move this node before the email node.
